education_required: ITI / Diploma in Tool & Die Making
raw_text:
13. Progressive Die Maker

Job Summary  
Expert in manufacturing complex progressive dies used for high -volume production.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Manufacture and assemble progressive dies  
• Perform die staging and alignment  
• Conduc t trials and optimize performance  
• Troubleshoot multi -stage die issues  
• Ensure high precision and repeatability  
Required Skills  
• Advanced die -making skills  
• Understanding of progressive die design  
• High precision machining  
• Analytical problem -solving  
Qual ification  
• ITI / Diploma in Tool & Die Making  
Experience  
• 5–8 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹30,000 – ₹60,000 per month
